final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2-1:1-1] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 2'b00;  // Synchronous reset to the initial state
        end else begin
            q <= q + 1;  // Increment the counter
        end
    end

endmodule
